descriptionShort: NHL game footage from 1991 showing Matt Hervey (Boston Bruins) and Bob Bassen (St. Louis Blues).
descriptionLong: Game footage from a 1991 NHL matchup between the Boston Bruins and St. Louis Blues, featuring Richmond Sockeyes alumni Matt Hervey and Bob Bassen. This archival clip captures professional career highlights from two 1987 Centennial Cup champions playing in the major leagues during the early 1990s.
